Off Calendar Jun-05-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS LARRY GREEN AND GARY TANIGUCHI'S Motion to Enforce Settlement Written Settlement Agreement And For Entry Of Judgment. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: GRANTED PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 664.7. REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES DENIED AS UNREASONABLE. IN VIEW OF OPPOSING COUNSEL'S NON-OPPOSITION, MATTER COULD HAVE BEEN PRESENTED BY WAY OF STIPULATION EX PARTE. INSUFFICIENT SHOWING THAT FEES REQUESTED ARE REASONABLE.
